title: arachnorchis applanata
intro: Arachnorchis applanata is a rare and endangered orchid native to Western Australia. It is prized for its unique and delicate appearance, with a flat, plate-like labellum and pale green and white flowers. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Arachnorchis applanata is traditionally used in herbal preparations to support respiratory health, and is often made into a tea or tincture to relieve symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions.
